fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Nevada SLP License Requirements — Fees, Board Contact & How to Apply (2026)
seo.description: Complete guide to Nevada speech-language pathologist licensing. Board fees, Praxis requirements, and telepractice rules for 2026.
seo.keywords: Nevada SLP license, speech-language pathologist Nevada, Nevada speech therapy license

board.name: Board of Examiners for Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology
board.parent_dept: Nevada Board of Examiners for Audiology and SLP
board.mailing_address: 5011 Meadowood Mall Way, Suite 300, Reno, NV 89502
board.physical_address: 5011 Meadowood Mall Way, Suite 300, Reno, NV 89502

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Nevada.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP
steps.description: Complete a master's degree from a CAA-accredited program.

steps.title: Pass the Praxis Examination
steps.description: Achieve a passing score on Praxis (test code 5331, score 162).

steps.title: Complete Clinical Fellowship
steps.description: Complete 36 weeks of supervised clinical practice.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit application with fees to the Board.

telepractice_text: Nevada permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Nevada issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Nevada is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Nevada SLP license cost?
faqs.answer: $300 initial. $200 biennial renewal. Nevada has among the highest SLP licensing fees.

faqs.question: Is Nevada part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Nevada allow telepractice for SLPs?
